analysis_description: Round 3 tapes (days 0–2): implied vol from mid via Brentq on BS call (r=0), T=dte_effective/365 with dte_eff from plot_iv_smile_round3 (csv day 0→8d open … 2→6d, linear intraday wind). Quadratic smile RMSE across strikes; mean bid-ask spread by product; BS vega at mids (scipy IV) aggregated in summary_iter0.json.
used_to_decide: Smile is smooth (low poly RMSE ~0.009–0.014); wings have very wide spreads (VEV_4000 ~20 ticks) vs near-ATM (~1–3). High vega concentrates near 5100–5400 strikes — informed wing widening and inventory skew on those strikes. Used same T convention in traders.

analysis_description: Parameter micro-grid on v0: (BASE_HALF_SPREAD, WING_KM_SQ_SCALE, EXTRACT_HEDGE_BETA) = (1.2,420,0.35) vs (1.75,280,0.22) vs (2.0,200,0.18); all worse than baseline on aggregate PnL. Separate 1-D sweep on EXTRACT_HALF found a small improvement at 2.45 (trader_v3).
used_to_decide: Kept v0 quote shape; only adopted EXTRACT_HALF=2.45 as a minimal change (trader_v3). Rejected larger wing/base tweaks and v2’s day-2-only extract widening.
